chameleon_reports.description: Chameleon reporting plugin (legacy naming with underscore). Provides stock reporting output.

shortcodes.monthly_stock_report: Renders a monthly stock report view.

simple-booking.description: Booking plugin used in Chameleon client work. Provides a booking form/flow.

demo-gate.description: Simple demo/gating plugin used in sample environments.

woo-region-stock-levels.description: WooCommerce regional stock control / enforcement plugin.

customer-reports.description: Customer report pack: various stock/job reports for clients.

shortcodes.customer_daily_jobs: Renders a customer daily jobs report.
shortcodes.lightfoot_daily_jobs: Renders a Lightfoot daily jobs report.
shortcodes.monthly_stock_report: Renders a monthly stock report view.

email-send-and-log.description: Email utility plugin: send email and log results for diagnostics/auditing.

engineer-move-serials.description: Tooling plugin to support engineer stock movements for serialized items.

erp-connector.description: ERP connector plugin (Chameleon): connects WordPress to ERP endpoints/data.

erp-job-search.description: ERP job search (Chameleon): NC/PO/reg/VIN + attachments via ERP Connector; ported from Lightfoot Job Search.

shortcodes.erp_job_search: Renders the ERP job search UI (AJAX to connector).

lkq-reports.description: LKQ customer portal reports (Chameleon): stock, daily jobs, 2-year detail. Default ERP client ID 328.

shortcodes.lkq_daily_jobs: Renders the LKQ daily jobs report.

woo-product-badges.description: WooCommerce product badges / tag-based labels plugin.

woo-export-import-customer-order-details.description: Export/import WooCommerce customer + order details plugin.
